title: DSDS Anatomy Definitions
description: Definitions for documenting the visual structure of a component — its named sub-elements (parts) and their associated tokens.

anatomyPart.description: A named sub-element of a component's visual structure.

required.description: Whether this part is always present.

tokens.description: Names of design tokens applied to this part.

links.description: Links to resources that represent this anatomy part — design tool nodes, source code blocks, documentation sections, or any other addressable reference. Uses the standard link type.

anatomy.description: The visual structure of a component.

parts.description: The named sub-elements of the component.
